# PEP 440 version ordering corpus.
#
# Vendored from pypa/packaging tests/test_version.py (VERSIONS list),
# commit 9d0ec47b36a1bcdf705b397b84cd89272410a00d.
# https://github.com/pypa/packaging — dual licensed under the
# Apache License, Version 2.0 and the BSD 2-Clause License.
#
# One version per line, in strictly ascending PEP 440 order: for every
# pair of lines (earlier, later), compare_versions(earlier, later) must
# be Ordering::Less.
1.0.dev0
1.0.dev456
1.0.dev456+local
1.0a0
1.0a0.post0.dev0
1.0a0.post0
1.0a1.dev1
1.0a1.dev1+local
1.0a1
1.0a1+local
1.0b0
1.0b1.dev456
1.0b2
1.0b2.post345.dev456
1.0b2.post345
1.0b2-346
1.0rc0
1.0rc1.dev1
1.0c1
1.0rc2
1.0
1.0.post0.dev0
1.0.post0
1.0.post456.dev34
1.0.post456
1.0.post456+local
1.0.1.dev1
1.0.1a1
1.0.1
1.0.1+local
1.0.1.post1
1.1.dev1
1.2+a
1.2+abc
1.2+abcdef
1.2+def
1.2+0
1.2+1
1.2+1.abc
1.2+1.1
1.2+1.1.0
1.2+2
1.2+123
1.2+123456
1.2.r32+123456
1.2.rev33+123456
1!1.0.dev0
1!1.0.dev456
1!1.0.dev456+local
1!1.0a0
1!1.0a0.post0.dev0
1!1.0a0.post0
1!1.0a1.dev1
1!1.0a1.dev1+local
1!1.0a1
1!1.0a1+local
1!1.0b0
1!1.0b1.dev456
1!1.0b2
1!1.0b2.post345.dev456
1!1.0b2.post345
1!1.0b2-346
1!1.0rc0
1!1.0rc1.dev1
1!1.0c1
1!1.0rc2
1!1.0
1!1.0.post0.dev0
1!1.0.post0
1!1.0.post456.dev34
1!1.0.post456
1!1.0.post456+local
1!1.0.1.dev1
1!1.0.1a1
1!1.0.1
1!1.0.1+local
1!1.0.1.post1
1!1.1.dev1
1!1.2+a
1!1.2+abc

1!1.2+def
1!1.2+0
1!1.2+1
1!1.2+1.abc
1!1.2+1.1

1!1.2+2
